since_last: 24% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.13%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 24% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.34% · BTC -0.70% · Gold -1.00% · Nasdaq100 -0.88%. 24% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.13%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.13%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.20%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -5.83%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +5.64%, BIDU +3.30%, ISRG +2.91%, INTU +1.26%, BABA +1.23%. Laggards: SKHY -5.83%, CEVA -5.62%, ARM -5.50%, AMBA -4.36%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.85% at $136.42
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.85% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
